name: Clumsy Bird
description: A Flappy Bird clone made with MelonJS. Tap to fly through obstacles!
instructions: Control your bird through a series of obstacles. Each obstacle you pass scores a point. Game ends when you hit a pipe or the ground.
howToPlay: Tap or click to make the bird flap upward. Navigate through the gaps between green pipes. Each gap you pass = 1 point. Hitting a pipe or the ground ends the game.

name: Hextris
description: An addictive fast-paced puzzle game inspired by Tetris with a hexagonal twist.
instructions: Rotate the hexagon to catch falling blocks. Match 3 or more same-colored blocks to clear them. Don't let blocks pile up to the top!
controls: Left / Right Arrow keys to rotate. Blocks fall automatically.
howToPlay: Blocks fall from the top toward the central hexagon. Use arrow keys to rotate the hexagon so blocks land on matching colors. Clear 3+ same-colored adjacent blocks to score.

name: Pac-Man HTML5
description: A faithful recreation of the classic Pac-Man arcade game using HTML5 Canvas.
instructions: Navigate Pac-Man through the maze eating all dots while avoiding ghosts. Power pellets let you eat ghosts temporarily.
controls: Arrow keys to move. Avoid ghosts (blue = vulnerable after power pellet)
howToPlay: Use arrow keys to move Pac-Man around the maze. Eat all small dots to clear the level. Eat large power pellets to turn ghosts blue, then eat them for bonus points.

name: HexGL
description: A futuristic HTML5 racing game built with Three.js. Race at high speed!
instructions: Race through a neon futuristic track at high speed. Avoid obstacles and reach the finish line as fast as possible.
controls: Arrow keys or WASD to steer. Avoid track edges.
howToPlay: Use arrow keys (or WASD) to steer your ship through the neon track. Stay on the road and avoid obstacles. Your speed increases over time. Reach the end of each stage to progress.

description: The wildly popular number puzzle game. Merge tiles to reach 2048!
instructions: Swipe to move tiles. Same-number tiles merge when they collide. Reach the 2048 tile to win!
controls: Arrow keys or swipe to move all tiles in a direction
howToPlay: Use arrow keys to shift all tiles on the board. When two tiles with the same number touch, they merge into one tile with their sum. Keep merging to reach 2048!

name: Space Invaders
description: A classic Space Invaders clone in HTML5. Defend Earth from aliens!
instructions: Shoot down alien invaders before they reach the bottom. Use shields for cover. Aliens get faster as you destroy more!
controls: Arrow keys to move, Space to shoot
howToPlay: Move left/right with arrow keys. Press Space to fire lasers at the alien formation. Don't let them reach the bottom of the screen. Destroy all aliens to advance.

name: Snake
description: The classic Snake game. Eat food, grow longer, avoid walls!
instructions: Guide the snake to eat food and grow. Don't hit walls or your own tail!
howToPlay: Use arrow keys to steer the snake toward the red food squares. Each food eaten makes the snake longer. Game ends if you hit the wall or your own body.

name: Duck Hunt JS
description: A JavaScript implementation of the classic NES Duck Hunt game.
instructions: Shoot ducks flying across the screen. Hit as many as you can before they fly away!
controls: Click / tap to shoot. Aim with mouse.
howToPlay: Ducks fly across the screen. Click/tap on them to shoot. You get a limited number of shots per round. Hit enough ducks to advance to the next round.

name: Flappy Bird
description: The classic Flappy Bird game. Tap to fly through pipes!
instructions: Tap to keep the bird in the air. Fly through pipe gaps to score points. Don't hit the pipes or ground!
howToPlay: Tap or press Space to make the bird flap upward. Navigate through the gaps between pipes. Each pipe gap you pass = 1 point. Hitting a pipe or the ground ends the game.

name: Custom Tetris
description: A customizable open-source Tetris implementation with many options.
instructions: Arrange falling tetromino blocks to create complete rows. Rows disappear when filled completely.
controls: Arrow keys to move/rotate. Down to speed up. Space to hard drop.
howToPlay: Left/Right arrows move the piece sideways. Up arrow rotates it. Down arrow soft-drops faster. Space hard-drops instantly. Fill complete horizontal rows to clear them and score.

name: Minesweeper
description: A faithful replica of the classic Minesweeper game. Clear the minefield!
instructions: Reveal all safe squares without clicking on mines. Numbers show how many mines are adjacent.
controls: Left-click to reveal a square. Right-click to flag a mine.
howToPlay: Click a square to reveal what's underneath. If it's a mine, game over! Numbers indicate how many of the 8 adjacent squares contain mines. Right-click to flag suspected mines. Clear all non-mine squares to win.

name: Breakout
description: The classic brick-breaking arcade game. Smash all the bricks!
instructions: Use the paddle to bounce the ball and break all the bricks at the top.
controls: Move mouse or arrow keys to control paddle
howToPlay: Move the paddle left/right using arrow keys or mouse. Keep the ball from falling off the bottom. Break all bricks to clear the level. Some bricks take multiple hits.

name: Micropolis (SimCity)
description: An HTML5 port of the original SimCity classic. Build your dream city!
instructions: Build and manage a city. Zone land, add utilities, and keep citizens happy. Balance budget and growth.
controls: Click to select tools. Use toolbar to zone/build zones, roads, power lines, etc.
howToPlay: Start by zoning residential, commercial, and industrial areas. Add roads for access and power lines for electricity. Police and fire stations reduce crime/fire risk. Balance your budget while your city grows.

name: Sudoku
description: A clean responsive HTML5 Sudoku game with multiple difficulty levels.
instructions: Fill the 9x9 grid so each row, column, and 3x3 box contains digits 1-9 exactly once.
controls: Click a cell, then click a number or use number keys to fill
howToPlay: Select an empty cell by clicking it. Then click a number (1-9) to place it, or use keyboard number keys. Each row, column, and 3x3 box must contain all digits 1-9 without repeats.
